decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_nyc-dot already correctly resolves to the canonical registry record for the New York City Department of Transportation. Entity name, type, and acronym all match the existing entity_nyc-dot registry card. No different record needs linking.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The logo for the New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_nycedc-qbb-study already correctly resolves to the canonical registry record for NYCEDC. Entity name ('New York City Economic Development Corporation'), entity_type ('agency'), and acronym ('NYCEDC') all match the existing entity_nycedc-qbb-study registry card. No different record needs linking.
